name: Venezuelan Black Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup long-grain white rice, rinsed and drained
lemon wedges and tabasco sauce -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion for 2-3 minutes.
2. Add celery, bell pepper, and rice.
3. Cook stirring until rice turns pale, 2-3 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low.
5. Add broth, turmeric, oregano, and salt.
6. Cover and cook until rice is tender and all liquid is absorbed, 15-20 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and fluff with fork.
8. Drain heated black beans and mix with rice.
9. Top with scrambled eggs and sprinkle with crushed red pepper.
10. Serve with lemon wedges and tabasco sauce.
